A TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN NEAR HYPOLITE MILLER ROAD SOUTH OF 754. THE TORNDO CROSSED 754 DAMAGING A SHED, TREES, AND CARS ALONG DARGIN ROAD. MINOR MOBILE HOME DAMAGE ALSO OCCURRED. A ROOF WAS REMOVED FROM ONE HOME ON MILLS ROAD. THE TORNDO CONTINUED TOWARD SMITTYS ROAD DAMAGING TREES AND POWER LINES.

TORNADO STARTED NEAR JUNIPER ROAD AND CAUSED ROOF DAMAGE TO A MOBILE HOME ALONG WITH TREE DAMAGE. THE TORNADO CONTINUE NORTHEAST WHERE IT CROSSED IVY ROAD AND CAUSED MORE TREE DAMAGE. FINALLY ENDING NEAR CHESTNUT ROAD WHERE WINDOW DAMAGE WAS NOTED.

TORNADO STARTED JUST TO THE EAST OF LA 10 SOUTH OF THE OF THE COMMUNITY OF BEGGS. THE TORNADO DAMAGED A FEW TREES NEAR THE STARTING LOCATION AND MOVE GENERALLY NORTH DAMAGING ROOF TO A HOME. THERE WAS SOME MINOR DAMAGE TO AN OUTBUILDING JUST SOUTHOF LA 10. AFTER CROSSING LA 10 THE TORNADO DAMAGED A THE ROOF OF THE UNION CHAPEL BAPTIST CHURCH AND TEARING SHEET METAL FROMAN OVERHANG ATTACHED TO THE CHURCH. POWER LINES WERE ALSO DOWNED AT THE CHURCH.
